summary: Phase 21 Portal Hub merge into EmployeesPortal — VERIFIED. All 3 bug fixes pass: (1) /admin/employees lands on unified Hub Home with data-testid='portal-hub' + hero + 5 chips + card grid, NOT the old EmployeesDashboard. (2) /admin/portal-hub redirects (client-side) to /admin/employees and renders the hub. (3) AdminHome's orange 'Portal Hub' CTA (data-testid='goto-employees-portal-btn') navigates to /admin/employees and shows hub. All 5 employee sidebar regressions (Dashboard, Departments, All Employees, Org Chart, Add Employee 3-step form) load correctly via Hub cards. All 5 chips (employees/hr/marketing/it/me) render the right card counts (5/5/5/3/7). All 6 cross-route card navigations (HR Settings, Marketing Dashboard, My Profile, My Tasks, Announcements, Policies) navigate to their existing pages successfully. Backend GET /api/admin/portal-hub/stats returns 200 with all 5 group keys; 4/4 pytest tests pass.

minor.issue: Backend computes `my_unread_announcements` (line 90) but does NOT include it in the response dict (lines 113-116). Frontend reads `stats.me.unread_announcements` (defaults to 0 with || 0 so non-fatal). Either remove the unused query or add the field to response.

issues: Date of Birth uses native browser <input type=date> picker instead of a shadcn calendar component — minor consistency issue (pre-existing, not introduced by this fix).

action_items: (Optional/minor) Add `my_unread_announcements` key under `me` in portal_hub.py response, OR remove the unused count_documents call. No functional impact today.
(Optional, pre-existing) Replace native date picker with shadcn Calendar component for consistency in Add Employee Step 1 — out of scope for this slice.
critical_code_review_comments: EmployeesPortal.jsx is now ~378 lines including embedded HubHome subcomponent + GROUP_CARDS + ACCENT_MAP constants. Approaching upper limit — consider extracting HubHome to /app/frontend/src/components/portal/HubHome.jsx and GROUP_CARDS config to a separate file if more features are added.
The 'IT' group cards are all marked `soon: true` (correctly disabled with opacity-60 + cursor-not-allowed). Good UX.
Frontend `stats.me.unread_announcements` reads a key the backend never returns — code defaults to 0 safely but creates a silent mismatch. See backend minor issue above.

data-testid coverage is excellent: portal-hub, portal-hub-hero, portal-hub-chips, portal-hub-chip-{key}, portal-hub-group-{key}, portal-hub-cards-{key}, portal-hub-card-{group}-{id} all present. Good testability.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded admin + existing employees/policies data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 21 Portal Hub now embedded inside EmployeesPortal at /admin/employees as default tab 'hub-home'. /admin/portal-hub redirects via client-side <Navigate>. Sidebar groups: Portal Hub → Employees → Jump To → Back to Main. All Slice 1 portal pages (/portal/my-profile, /portal/my-tasks, /portal/announcements, /portal/policies) verified loading from Me chip cards. Backend stats endpoint at /api/admin/portal-hub/stats stable. SSE notifications stream causes Playwright `networkidle` waits to hang — always use `domcontentloaded` for navigation waits in this app.
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration validates a fix; no new bug found. The only RCA-worthy finding is a tiny backend↔frontend key mismatch (`my_unread_announcements` vs `unread_announcements`) that is silently masked by JS `|| 0` fallback.
